raw:
## Completed
Implemented the pure Foreman Gate-1 assumption scorer and wired it into the founder plan render. Assumptions are now scored/ranked advisory-only by P(wrong) × cost, annotated at Gate 1, and preserve the future `team` route seam.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/scorer.ts` - new pure scorer module with risk bands, kind routing, glob matching, keyword/cost hint support.
- `extensions/foreman/gates.ts` - added `loadHighRiskPaths(cwd)`.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - Gate-1 assumptions now optionally score/reorder/annotate when scorer context is passed.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - passes manifest `highRiskPaths` into Gate-1 rendering.
- `extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh` - new headless scorer + surfacing tests.
- `.pi/foreman.json` - verify gate now runs `scorer_test.sh`.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - documented the new scorer module.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
Also ran the full existing `extensions/foreman/test/*.sh` suite plus dashboard reader test successfully.
